title: cineraria diversifolia
intro: Cineraria diversifolia, also known as the Mexican marigold or false yellow daisy, is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cineraria diversifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health issues. Cineraria diversifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various conditions.
